languages.text: [Осторожно сойти с Патента, шепча молитвы покаяния] "Да простит нас Бог-Император..."
[Carefully step off the Warrant, whispering prayers of repentance] "May the God-Emperor forgive us..."

languages.text: 「保証証を慎重に降りる」 「神皇帝が私たちを許して」
languages.original_text: [Carefully step off the Warrant] "May the God-Emperor forgive us..."

languages.text: [Apartarte cuidadosamente de la Patente, susurrando plegarias de arrepentimiento] «Que el Dios Emperador nos perdone...».
languages.original_text: [Carefully step off the Warrant, whispering prayers of repentance] "May the God-Emperor forgive us..."

traits.locale_text: [Apartarte cuidadosamente de la Patente, susurrando plegarias de arrepentimiento] «Que el Dios Emperador nos perdone...».

languages.text: [Vorsichtig vom Handelsbrief zurücktreten und Bußgebete flüstern] "Möge der Gottimperator uns vergeben ..."

languages.text: [Vous écarter prudemment de la lettre de marque, en murmurant des prières de repentance] « Puisse l'Empereur-Dieu nous pardonner... »

languages.text: [Dualar okuyarak Ruhsatname'nin üzerinden dikkatlice in] "Tanrı İmparator bizi affetsin..."
